ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the testing period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the testing period */,
  "start_date_year" INTEGER /* Year of the start date */,
  "start_date_week" INTEGER /* Week number of the start date */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week in the format YYYY-WW */,
  "testing_period_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the testing period */,
  "testing_period_type" TEXT /* Type of testing period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prevalence_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing period */,
  "percentage_pop_est" REAL /* Percentage of the population estimated to be testing positive */,
  "percentage_pop_est_lci" REAL /* Lower confidence interval for the percentage of the population testing positive */,
  "percentage_pop_est_uci" REAL /* Upper confidence interval for the percentage of the population testing positive */,
  "estimated_avg_num_people_positive" INTEGER /* Estimated average number of people testing positive */,
  "pop_est_lci" INTEGER /* Lower confidence interval for the estimated number of people testing positive */,
  "pop_est_uci" INTEGER /* Upper confidence interval for the estimated number of people testing positive */,
  "estimated_avg_ratio_population_positive" TEXT /* Estimated average ratio of the population testing positive */,
  "ratio_lci" TEXT /* Lower confidence interval for the ratio of the population testing positive */,
  "ratio_uci" TEXT /* Upper confidence interval for the ratio of the population testing positive */,
  "estimate_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the estimate */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prevalence_estimates_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES testing_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing period */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the test was conducted */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., PCR, Antigen) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "test_result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the test result */,
  "test_result_confirmed" INTEGER /* Whether the test result was confirmed by further testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES testing_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, public health official, admin) */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the testing period being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES testing_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing period */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES testing_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing period */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* List of authors for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES testing_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
